content: Phase 0.1: Archive existing FARM template to /app/legacy/
Phase 0.4: Bootstrap Next.js + TS + Tailwind + shadcn/ui in /app
Phase 0.6: Configure supervisor (Next.js on 3000, FastAPI proxy on 8001)
Phase 0.7: Apply schema.sql v3 to Supabase via Management API (46 tables, RLS, indexes)
Phase 0.9: lib/ scaffolding (supabase, auth, crypto AES-256-GCM, email, actions)
Phase 0.10: Design system tokens (Inter, zinc+teal, layout shells)
Phase 0.11: Auth flow + middleware role-based redirect
Phase 0.13: Day-3 RLS test script (7/7 passed)
Phase 0.14: End-to-end browser verification (all 3 role shells)
Phase 1: Core operations (clients, services, tasks, compliance, queries)
Phase 2: Vaults, Docs, Team Ops, vCFO, BizLens embed
Phase 3: Polish, DPDP audit, launch prep
